textByHash.b9dcd4ed5b25ab9d211a77f079a53acc43c7b332: Mother cannot mean to kill Snowflake, surely?
textByHash.0e3bce9574ea8fce3d23bcc0ecc5cd7f89974bcc: Um... that was not what I meant.
textByHash.9f47cea9918c93d95219ef68a4826dac89aacf9f: Odd? Well my name Odd Stone. Got named after some odd stone thing I found in snowfields south of Weiss.
textByHash.ad15bbdef2162d5c9dc53d29ddf5b45ffedb014b: Yeah, it were made of stone, and it were odd. Some weird bone-head human saw me trying to nibble it, an' he got really upset an' chased me away. He kinda scary.
textByHash.104fdccd4446e17841d6761a8b868a9bde77030e: Anyway, my parents, they named me Odd Stone after that, and now we trolls not go anywhere near the place. Bone-head human was, like, really scary! And probably magic.
textByHash.165922244ecc76cf1afef5af87dac0f0f1d00aff: No. We trolls blocked all routes to snowfields from here, but we keep eye out just in case. No bone-head human out there in ages.
textByHash.c230fbcb5d89b80dbdbbc8e35692c3e513b0411a: Don't think so. Maybe you ask Snowflake and My Arm though?
textByHash.8722546f27f67c06b81f2de442113a6149bd1ab8: I am Odd Stone. Got named after some odd stone thing I found in the snowfields south of Weiss.
textByHash.2d7a9a93eb5d28eebc8b0b41b706d106229d835d: Anyway, my parents they named me Odd Stone after that, and now we trolls not go anywhere near the place. Bone-head human was, like, really scary! And probably magic.
textByHash.51265bd506eb89bfa43bd485c762c44fe1a5380f: No, we trolls blocked all routes to snowfields from here. Don't want scary bone-head human coming to Weiss.
textByHash.14fc38ea7b131bcd8ffc882d4d56b772b5e7fa77: This here is Weiss. Trolls built it years ago, after we got kicked out from caves further south. Now Weiss is our home.
textByHash.f04038d3acc8b156d405d793dd7196e03de9c3bb: We done pretty good here. Got lots of goat and wolf to eat - they taste kinda boring after all this time, but there not much other choice.
textByHash.f23ba4271956bca912982bd2abec33780f7a77b0: Never heard of no gouty weed, no. But it sound like a vegetable, an' Mother not like eating those, so we probably not gonna try it.
textByHash.9e333ab469b24ada25a9ab38f338344a6903994f: Mother not like new ideas much, but he really big, an' he boss, so we do what he say.
textByHash.47c2a7991ba07e07a46194eab1572613fcb9c836: Eh, it kinda rough, but it our home. Odd Mushroom say he can make it nicer with fancy fires what he invented, but Mother not interested in that, so Odd Mushroom not allowed to do it.
textByHash.226086f4905861a1e31794724c4b9d22d9ad7029: Mother only care about stuff to help him fight better. An he really big, an' he boss, so we do what he say.
textByHash.d7f4d318dff434f9dd902f343542442698788180: I am Odd Stone. Got named after some odd stone thing I found in snowfields south of Weiss.
textByHash.f308e442830a4eda0a2f26b6f77fb4a7ce6a76c6: It great here, now Snowflake an' her husband troll taught us goutweed farming. Food so much better now.
textByHash.5723f04b39aaece338077b4c3d7980729c855ba1: Eh, it kinda rough, but it getting better. Snowflake, she taught us goutweed farming. Goat, wolf, human all taste so much nicer with goutweed in.
textByHash.7e0537a798ff4116912ddb9e5a17ecdb952340ac: So yeah, Weiss is good place to live, now Snowflake in charge. All trolls like Snowflake. Her husband troll kinda weird, but that not our problem.
